markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, strategy, and next steps for Outset's content marketing engagement with GrowthX Labs.](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Outset aims to build content authority in the pre-med/healthcare education space, targeting high school students and parents](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Focus on driving web traffic and SEO rankings initially, with leads as a longer-term goal (12-24 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Content strategy to include deep dives on medical specialties, career paths, and potentially college program rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop content strategy, conduct research, and ramp up content production over coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Topics

### Outset's Business Model and Goals

  - [Summer programs for high school students interested in healthcare careers](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [$3-5M revenue target for this summer, aiming for $10-50M in next few years](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [Multi-year, multi-point product vision (high school, online, gap year, college programs)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)
  - [Building brand authority and expertise to stay ahead of emerging competition](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

### Target Audience and Customer Journey

  - [Primary: High school students (grades 9-10) interested in healthcare careers](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Secondary: Parents of those students](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Tertiary: High school career counselors](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2195.0)
  - [Future potential: Private schools (for group packages)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2222.0)
  - [Journey: Interest spark → Summer availability → Parent sees ROI + Student excitement → Application → Interview → Acceptance](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)

### Content Strategy Objectives

  - [Build comprehensive blog/content ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Establish authority in pre-med/healthcare education space](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Diversify from paid channels, build organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Create content similar to NerdWallet's approach, but for medical specialties](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Potential development of college pre-med program rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Direct competitors: Summer Discovery, SLC (broad programs including healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2902.0)
  - [University-run healthcare summer programs (e.g. Wake Forest)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2962.0)
  - [SEO competitors: Various pre-med/healthcare education content creators](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)

### Technical Setup and Resources

  - [Website built on Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Custom blog format inspired by Ramp's content structure](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=2736.0)
  - [Access to paid search/social accounts, analytics, and customer feedback data](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3199.0)
  - [Recently created customer stories/testimonials](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conduct research and develop initial content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Lawson to provide access to necessary accounts (Webflow, analytics, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3181.0)
  - [Lawson to review and provide feedback on GrowthX's company brief](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3374.0)
  - [Schedule 1-hour strategy session for next week (Thursday preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3479.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin developing content opportunities and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/Sb7jBEVZHpuq4b6r-jEYqPgbudsvxxx-?tab=summary&timestamp=3513.0)
